This article details a subject that is considered canon.
This article covers the Canon version of this subject.
Click here for Wookieepedia's article on the Legends version of this subject.
The story of galactic history involved countless beings over thousands of generations.
Mosaic depiction of the Prime Jedi
Jedha was an ancient world sacred to the Jedi and many other faiths.
Neimoidia, colonized by the Duros species, some of whom evolved into Neimoidians
Massassi warriors built great temples on Yavin 4.
The Gungans and the Elders lived on Naboo together until the latter civilization's sudden withdrawal, leaving ruins in the swamplands.
Many individuals, Jedi and Sith, met their end on Malachor.
The Chiss Ascendancy existed in an isolated enclave in the galaxy's Unknown Regions.
Many such as Momin (pictured) were labeled heretics in the Orders of the Jedi and Sith, and much of their journeys have been dismissed from history.
Middle Era of the Old Republic
A depicts the slaying of a Jedi
Constructed under King Jafan, Theed was perched atop the tributaries of Naboo's .
A Young Vildar Mac is attacked by a Sorcerer of Tund.
Seismic Events and Their Role in Force Confluences
first battle of the Eiram and E'ronoh War
Representatives of various Force-based religions meet on Jedha
Armed with the Great Leveler, the Path of the Open Hand starts its campaign against the Jedi.
The twin planets of Eiram and E'ronoh wage war on each other, as the Chancellors of the Republic and the Jedi Order try to mediate for peace.
Wedding of Phan-tu Zenn and Xiri A'lbaran
Porter Engle and Barash Silvain fight at the Siege of Firevale.
The Final Protector statue falls during the Battle of Jedha.
The San Tekka and the Graf prospecting families compete at the Hyperspace Chase.
Azlin Rell begins an obsession with the Nameless that will last for decades.
The Techo Union takes control of the planet Mustafar.
Padawans Cohmac Vitus and Orla Jareni during their time on the of the .
Crulkon raiders attack a Scalvi community on the planet .
Asgar Ro is murdered by his son Marchion.
With the breakdown of hyperspace throught the galaxy, Knights of the Jedi Order gathered at Starlight Beacon and were tasked to protect those stranded in the darkness of space.
Starlight Beacon better connected citizens, and the joint Jedi–Republic effort marked a golden age for life in the galaxy.
Omar Berenko penned the disturbing epic Defense of Naboo at his scenic lake retreat at Varykino.
Jedi Master Sskeer struggles with the effects of the .
Feb Rozo and the Sap Tap Trio
The Tanglevine Base on the planet Tenoo.
Avar Kriss relies on the , battling the Drengir threat.
Jedi glory was at its peak in the High Republic Era, although dark forces rising in the new frontier of the Outer Rim threatened the Force itself.
The Nihil attack the Republic Fair on Valo.
Stellan Gios finds the calcified body of Loden Greatsorm on Grizal.
The scientist Chancey Yarrow starts working for the Nihil.
Keeve Trennis and Terec infiltrate the Nihil.
Marchion Ro and the She'ar arrive to Planet X to collect the Nameless.
The Jedi council enacts the Guardian Protocols.
Azlin Rell causes a massive ship to crash into Travyx Prime.
The "Scarlet Skulls" Jedi team unite at the Lonisa City Zoo.
mission to recover an abandoned Nihil ship
Vernestra Rwoh, Avon Starros and Jordanna Sparkburn during their time in the Occlusion Zone.
Burryaga Agaburry manages to defeat a Nameless on Naboo.
Republic Defense Coalition soldiers face a Nameless on the planet Ballum.
Churo, Jamil Sollis, Kildo, Tep Tep and Zenny Greylark ride tortles on Palagosal.
Lily Tora-Asi faces the Nihil at the Battle on Banchii.
The Padawan Cam Lindon encounters the Great Progenitor at the wreckage of Starlight Beacon.
Reath Silas faces the blight on Kashyyyk.
Part of the Luminous Nine on .
Sean meditates amongst the lights and lives of the Aakaash system.
Vaale, home of the artisans who crafted the twni Rings of Vaale.
Vernestra Rwoh and Indara during their investigation of the four-seven lightsaber nullifiers.
Indara, Sol, Torbin, and Kelnacca face the Brendok coven at their fortress.
Padawans Jecki Lon and Yord Fandar participate in the Crowning Convocation at the planet Siline.
A contingent of Jedi led by Sol goes to Khofar.
Serenno, of House Serenno, was home to Counts Ramil and Dooku.
From this point onwards, Loth-wolves are not reported to be seen for a hundred years.
The long-lived pirate Maz Kanata and her holocron would reunite after over a century.
The Kallidahin sought to uncover the mysteries of their supposed forebears at the ruins of Polis Massa.
Palpatine presided over the opening of the Theed power generator.
Obi-Wan Kenobi was raised in the Jedi Temple on Coruscant.
Wilhuff Tarkin's childhood on his homeworld Eriadu
Shmi Skywalker's child was a vergence in the Force, one Darth Sidious came to manipulate to further his own power.
Yoda—the Deliverer—embarked on a journey of stone and human; fear and forgiveness; selflessness and selfishness. Ultimately, balance is restored through sacrifice.
Qui-Gon and Obi-Wan face the Kaijura.
Qui-Gon Jinn faces an attack of the Metal Clan at the planet Bri'n.
Ahsoka Tano's parents discover her Force-sensitivity.
Plo Koon brought Ahsoka Tano from Shili for her to be trained as a Jedi.
Darth Maul and his first Jedi target, Eldra Kaitis
The Trade Federation marches upon Theed
The Jedi, as well as the newly elected Supreme Chancellor Palpatine, watch on as a new era of peace is celebrated between the Gungan and Naboo societies.
Sidious' new apprentice, Lord Tyranus, hires the infamous bounty hunter Jango Fett for the creation of a clone army of the Republic to orchestrate a costly galactic war.
Inhibitor chips overrode clones' wills, submitting them to the whim of the Supreme Chancellor.
Supreme Chancellor Sheev Palpatine and Jedi in the latter's Temple, on Anakin Skywalker
Zillo Beasts were hunted to near-extinction by the Dugs of Malastare.
A , complete with a above the Republic Senate Building
Entangled by his duty as a Jedi, his commitment to freeing his mother, and his passion for Padmé Amidala, Anakin Skywalker contemplates his choices at the onset of war at Varykino.
mission to prevent her from dying
The Sith exploited the galaxy's budding corporate interests to create a confederacy against the Republic.
The Grand Army of the Republic assembles on Coruscant
Anakin and Obi-Wan during their time in Cato Neimoidia.
The Republic negotiated with Jabba the Hutt, who fathered a son named Rotta.
mission to the twelfth moon of Yout
The incompetence of Ventress' ill-inspired droids and the assassin's frustration were the underpinning factors of her failure.
Skytop Station serving as a listening post for the Confederacy of Independent Systems.
The Lurmen chose to take the path of resistance
Seven warriors taught the otherwise defenseless farmers of to fight for their own place on the perilous world of Felucia
Master Windu during the defense of Dantooine.
Death Watch conducts a campaign to destabilize the New Mandalorian goverment.
The Endurance is sabotaged by Boba Fett.
Clone troopers defended their home against the Separatist onslaught at .
bombing of Coruscant's central power distribution grid
The bombing of Coruscant's central power distribution grid disrupts the peace processes.
Through improvised tactics, a Republic strike team won the Battle of Lola Sayu.
Confederate–Republic peace conference held at Mandalore.
Darth Sidious orchestrated a chain of events that furthered Anakin Skywalker's distrust of his Master and the Jedi Council.
The Onderon Civil War is fought between the Separatist-backed Royal Court of Onderon and the Republic-backed Onderon Rebels.
D-Squad's , who was lost in action saving his newfound friends.
The Jedi Obi-Wan Kenobi holds Satine for a final time.
bombing of the Jedi Temple hangar
The trial of Ahsoka Tano leads to her eventual departure from the order.
The Chiss Ascendancy comes under threat of the Nikardun conquests led by Yiv the Benevolent.
Chiss Senior Captain Mitth'raw'nuruodo during the time of the Nikardun Conquests.
The conquests of Yiv the Benevolent produce a conflict that involves the of , the of , the centered on , the , and the of , among other nations of the Unknown Regions.
Thrawn, seeking new technology in his fight against the Nikardun, and Anakin Skywalker, trying to find the missing Padmé, end up working together against the Separatists on Batuu and Mokivj.
Padmé Amidala meets InterGalactic Banking Clan officials on the planet Scipio.
Jedi Master Yoda embarked on a journey of acceptance, admitting his faults and facing his fears.
Though having tread the path of darkness, the journeys Quinlan Vos and Asajj Ventress took wound in redemption.
Maul realized the Great Plan that Darth Sidious had set in place and was determined to thrive in the chaos to come and overthrow the Dark Lord.
Consumed by his fear of losing his lover and the resulting lust for power, Anakin Skywalker was transformed into Darth Vader in his inability to let go.
With the Force drenched in darkness, many Jedi detached themselves from the wider galaxy, allowing for the reign of the New Order.
Recruits are favored over clones as standard soldiers as the Empire builds up its new army.
The clones cross a mountain range on Daro to rescue an old friend from the new stormtroopers.
Governor Grotton and his entourage are taken prisoner by Governor Ames.
The clone of the Zillo Beast is retaken to Mount Tantiss.
Part of the leadership of the Empire meets at Raven's Peak on Eriadu.
The Empire invades the island of Pabu in search of Omega.
Members of the Chiss species decide to attack the remnants of the Nikardum military after their defeat of Yiv the Benevolent.
Thrawn during the Agbui attempt to destabilize the Chiss Ascendancy.
little damage is actually being done
The Nine Rulling Families come close to provoke a civil war in the Chiss Ascendancy after falling in the trap set by the Agbui.
Grysk plot to engineer a Chiss civil war
The tensions between the Chiss Great Families lead to engagements on Csaus and Sarvchi, among other worlds of the Ascendancy.
The Grysk attack the Chiss Ascendancy by simultaneously increasing tensions between the Great families and using the Kilji Illumine nation to engage the Chiss military.
board the Kilji warship and kill all aboard
For his actions against the Grysk, Thrawn is exiled from the Chiss Ascendancy.
The Imperial invasion of Mon Cala begins.
Inspired by Ahsoka Tano, the people of Raada rose up against Imperial oppression.
Governor Ahr and Vader attack insurgents on the planet Namzor.
The Erso family escapes Coruscant after discovering Krennic's true intentions for Galen's research.
Master and apprentice, Darth Sidious and Vader journeyed through the hostile lands of Ryloth.
Tarkin and Vader arrive to Murkhana.
Wilhuff Tarkin during the time of Berch Teller's campaign.
Tarkin gives a series of interviews where he outlines his ideas that would come to be known as the Tarkin Doctrine.
Secret mission to rebuild the Jedi Order
Survivors of Sith purges accept and let go of their past suffering, moving on to rise and work to restore their kind with respect to choice and the trust in the Force.
Han and Qi'ra chose to flee from a life of slavery on Corellia, though Han wounds up a cadet of the Empire and Qi'ra becomes indebted to Crimson Dawn.
The former Anakin Skywalker would not let his lover go, and an apparition of her in his Force vision was destroyed.
Thrawn and Vanto face the human colonist of the Hollenside Enclave on the planet Cyphar.
Thrawn studies the operations of rebel leader Nevil Cygni.
Hakko Drazlip and the Tootle Froots
Han Solo was demoted to the for saving a fellow pilot by disregarding protocol and orders.
Embroiled in various complications amid a coaxium affair inundated with duplicitous betrayals on all sides, Han Solo was left behind by Qi'ra in her struggle for survival in the criminal underworld.
Obi-Wan Kenobi lived in exile on Tatooine to protect Luke Skywalker.
Khel Tanna's crew escapes Galator III aboard the Millenium Falcon.
The criminal Corbus Tyra steals the Millenium Falcon from Han Solo and Chewbacca.
Phaedra, a prisoner in the Gulhadar prison, joins Han Solo and Chewbacca in their search for the urn.
The Ferrixian Salman Paak joins Luthen Rael's rebel network.
Viceroy Gar Saxon becomes the Emperor's Hand and the Imperial puppet ruler of Mandalore.
Taramyn Barcona, Karis Nemik, Arvel Skeen and Cassian Andor disguised as Imperial Army troopers on Aldhani.
A rebel group known as the Spectres begins efforts to undermine Imperial control on Lothal.
The enslaved wookies, aided by the Spectres, fight for their freedom on Kessel.
Ezra Bridger frees Morad Sumar, his wife, and an Aqualish prisoner from the Galactic Empire.
The Ghost destroys the Imperial convoy transporting the kyber crystal.
The Phantom escapes TIE fighters on Lothal.
The Spectres bomb the Empire Day parade on Lothal.

Jedi-learner Ezra Bridger of the Spectres made a call for action against years of Imperial rule. The spark of hope is shared by Lothalites despite attempts to quell the rebel resolve by the dispatchment of high-ranking Imperials.
Lothal is sieged by the Empire to stop the activities of the Spectres rebel cell.
Through their actions and experiences made together, clone and Jedi uprooted the distrust sowed between them by Darth Sidious.
Orson Krennic presides the Maltheen Divide Conference, where the supression of Ghorman is decided.
The Ferrixian refugees on Mina-Rau are targeted by the Empire.
Quarsh Panaka is assassinated in his chalet on Onoam by a bombing of Saw Gerrera's Partisans.
Debating the employment of either diplomacy or explosives over the Protectors of Concord Dawn, the Spectres ultimately captured their leader by force for peaceful negotiations.
Kanan Jarrus and Ezra Bridger face the Seventh Sister and the Fifth Brother on Oosalon.
Tempted by knowledge that could destroy the Sith, Ezra Bridger joined forces with Maul on Malachor, though the encounter ultimately led to the loss of Ahsoka Tano at her former master's hands.
Doctor Gorst is trapped by Bix Caleen.
The Batonn Insurgency is contained by Imperial forces led by Admiral Thrawn.
Members of Phoenix Cell attack the Imperial Naraka prison to liberate the pirate Hondo Ohnaka.
Clone and droid reconciled at their last battle. Opposing Clone Wars veterans realized their mutual fall to the machinations of the Sith.
Saw Guerrera investigates the Imperial operation on Geonosis.
Imperial soldiers attack peaceful protestors on Palmo Plaza, committing the Ghorman Massacre.
Maul accepted his death, learning of Obi-Wan Kenobi's task in nurturing a new hope for the galaxy imbalanced by the Sith.
The Partisans and the Spectres are threatened by Captain Slavin's Star Destroyer.
Sabine Wren steals the prototype TIE Defender Elite.
Phoenix Squadron's attack on Lothal was foiled by Thrawn's blockade, and Imperial forces captured Spectre leader Hera Syndulla in the streets of Lothal.
Thrawn's friend, Eli Vanto, serving under Admiral Ar'alani of the Chiss Ascendancy.

Ezra Bridger accepts the passing of his parents and mentor, who sacrificed themselves to save the ones they loved. Thus resisting darkness and foiling the plans of the Sith, Bridger later does likewise for his new-found family.
ISB Tacticals raid the Axis network safehouse on Coruscant attempting to capture Kleya Marki.
Imperial Detention Center & Labor Camp LEG-817
The Rebellion won a hardfought victory at Scarif, marking the beginning of open war against the Empire.
Obi-Wan Kenobi and Anakin Skywalker duel aboard the first Death Star.

text: The Great Tree was replanted as the galaxy saw a new day, a new beginning.
The Kuat shipyards are conquered by the New Republic.
Luke Skywalker and Rynn Zenat fight Adelhard's forces on Gallowyss
Many worlds overcame the control of the Empire with popular unrest throughout the galaxy.
Chaos over Jakku; New Republic emerged victorious, and peace is restored to the wider galaxy as dark forces retreat into the shadows of the Unknown Regions.
Balancing family and service, Leia Organa found her place in leading the galactic populace from the Core Worlds with her newborn son, Ben Solo.
The , the governmental body controlling the Fenril sector, breaks trade relations and begins hostilities with the New Republic.
Leia and Alaytia try to escape imprisonment from the Zantarrk Gang at Kaltrais.
The Nagai revolt on Kaltrais against their masters of the Fenril Consortium.
The New Republic supports the Nagai in their fight against the Fenril Consortium and Reyna Oskure.
The Mandalorian bounty hunter Din Djarin had become like a father to Grogu, a child who was sought by others for his potential in the Force.
The Nite Owls capture an Imperial Gozanti-class Assault Carrier.
Grogu meditates on the seeing stone.
The Pykes initiate a takeover of Tatooine with the help of Cad Bane.
In the streets of Mos Espa, the Pykes are defeated by Boba Fett and his allies.
The occupying pirates of Gorian Shard are defeated by the Children of the Watch.
The Mandalorians retake their ancestral homeworld from Moff Gideon.
Shin Hati duels Sabine Wren for the control of the map to Thrawn.
The Jedi Sabine Wren, Ahsoka Tano, and Ezra Bridger face Thrawn's forces
Ben Solo was sent to train under Luke Skywalker, and Leia Organa eventually resumed her work in the Senate.
Poe Dameron during his time with the Spice Runners of Kijimi.
Zorii Bliss, of the Spice Runners of kijimi.
The Spice Runners attempt to eliminate their rivals at the Kijimi summit.
Hosnian Prime Academy of Law Enforcement
Sith Eternal cultists kept Darth Sidious alive on Exegol. Through Sith loyalists, the Dark Lord prepared for a final conquest of the galaxy.
The Amaxine warriors unleash a crisis in the New Republic Senate in preparation for the arrival of the First Order.
Failing to inspire action in the Senate and with public outcry over her parentage, Leia Organa founded the Resistance to act outside Republic restrictions.
Burdened with expectations of galactic heroes, frustrated with their vision of himself, and seeing himself abandoned, Ben Solo renounced his family's legacy.
With Operation: Sabre Strike, the Resistance exposes the dealings between the Corporate Sector Authority and the First Order.

Both in search of the self-exiled Luke Skywalker, Poe Dameron served Leia Organa faithfully and without compromising others, whilst First Order forces led by Agent Terex razed through worlds and pursued their own ambitions en route.
Lor San Tekka is rescued from the Great Forveen Nebula by Black Squadron.
Kazuda Xiono, sent by the Resistance, arrives to the Colossus platform to spy on the First Order.
The Platform Classic sky race is held on the Colossus.

Imanuel Doza yielded the Colossus to "First Order protection" following threats to his daughter. However, Doza eventually atoned for his apathy, joining his family and friends in confronting the oppression of the First Order.
Kylo Ren attacks the village of Tuanul, seeking Lor San Tekka and the map to Luke Skywalker.
disable the fleet and eliminate Kai
With the Hosnian Cataclysm, the New Republic goverment is dismanteled.
Believing that purging of his past would make himself stronger, Ben Solo, hiding behind the façade of "Kylo Ren," ended his father's life.

Siroc was adamant in flying in "the way the wind is blowing," thinking that resistance against the new order would only lead to more suffering, and that the new order would peacefully negotiate with his people.
Both lost and alone, a bond of compassion formed between the Jedi-aspirant Rey and Kylo Ren.
The Colossus is sabotaged by First Order operative and engineer Nenavakasa Nalor.
Kazuda Xiono and Neeku Vozo infiltrate the First Order supertanker fuel depot Titan to steal hardware for the Colossus.
At the suppression of the Aeos system, the First Order bombards Aeos Prime as punishment for helping the Resistance.
Leia Organa persuaded the initially reluctant people of Mon Cala to unite and wage war in sacrifice for their world's freedom against the tyrannical First Order.
The Official Black Spire Outpost Cookbook
Kylo Ren was determined to follow the footsteps of his grandfather, Darth Vader, heeding his example as a lord of destruction.
Realizing his parents and Rey still loved him, Ben Solo sought to find his strength and do what must be done.
The return of the Sith and the coming of an eternal Final Order is ended with the dyadic strength of Rey and Ben, culminating in the rise of Skywalker.
Jedi Master Rey Skywalker aims to create a new Jedi Order
